## How tested
<!-- What did you do to verify? Screenshots for UI changes, especially RTL. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] User-facing text goes through i18n (no hardcoded EN strings in components)
- [ ] RTL tested if UI changed (set browser to `ar` locale)
- [ ] No customer PII in code, logs, or screenshots
- [ ] VAT / RTA compliance considered if pricing or legal text touched
- [ ] Tests added/updated if logic changed
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
